name: upstash
description: Work with any Upstash TypeScript/JavaScript SDK including Redis, Box, QStash, Workflow, Vector, Search and Ratelimit.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 upstash 相關工作
幫我啟用 upstash 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 upstash

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the upstash skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
